subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of Names and Attributes! Praise be to God, thou art adorned with the raiment of sincerity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا علیک بهاءالله مولی الاسماء و الصفات لله الحمد بطراز خلوص مزینی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
